mnemonics.title: PROCESS STATE MEMORY AID
mnemonics.content: NEW READY RUNNING WAITING TERMINATED - NRWNT. THINK OF A NURSE (NEW-READY-WAITING-RUNNING-NURSES-TERMINATED) - EASIER TO REMEMBER.

mnemonics.title: PCB COMPONENTS
mnemonics.content: SCIPEM: STATE, COUNTER, I/O, PROCESS INFO, EXECUTION INFO, MEMORY. STATE-REG-CPU-I/O-ACC-MEM (SCRAM).

mnemonics.title: SCHEDULER TYPES
mnemonics.content: LONG TERM ADMITS, SHORT TERM SELECTS, MEDIUM SWAPS. LONG = ADMISSION, SHORT = CPU SELECT, MEDIUM = SUSPEND.

mnemonics.title: PROCESS VS PROGRAM
mnemonics.content: A PROGRAM IS STORED (PASSIVE), A PROCESS IS ACTIVE (EXECUTING). P IS FOR PROGRAM=PERMANENT/PASSIVE, PROCESS=PACE/PROGRESS.

acronyms.usage: Data structure storing process information - state, PC, registers, memory limits, I/O status, accounting data.
The main processor that executes process instructions. Managed by process scheduling.
Unique number assigned to each process for identification by the OS.
Operations that cause process to wait - keyboard, disk, network - triggering state change to Waiting.
System software that manages hardware and provides process management services.
Signal to CPU indicating need for attention - triggers context switching.
Simplest scheduling algorithm - processes handled in order of arrival.

visualTips.visualization: THINK OF A WATER CYCLE: NEW (RAIN DROP FORMS) -> READY (CLOUD) -> RUNNING (RAIN) -> WAITING (EVAPORATION IN PROGRESS) -> TERMINATED (GOES BACK TO SOURCE). TRANSITIONS ARROW BETWEEN STATES IN A CIRCULAR PATTERN.
IMAGINE TWO STUDENTS (PROCESSES) SHARING ONE NOTEBOOK (CPU). WHEN ONE STUDENT FINISHES, THEY SAVE THEIR PAGE (SAVE STATE), PASS NOTEBOOK TO OTHER STUDENT WHO OPENS THEIR SAVED PAGE (RESTORE STATE).
THINK OF PCB AS A PASSPORT - CONTAINS ALL VITAL INFO: IDENTITY (PID), LOCATION (MEMORY MAP), CURRENT ACTIVITY (REGISTERS), TRAVEL HISTORY (ACCOUNTING). ONE PER PROCESS LIKE ONE PASSPORT PER PERSON.
FAMILY TREE: PARENT (GRANDPARENT) CREATES CHILDREN (PARENT) WHO CREATE GRANDCHILDREN (CHILD). FORK() IS LIKE CLONING - GET EXACT COPY BUT DIFFERENT MEMORY.

analogies.analogy: PROCESS MANAGEMENT IS LIKE A RESTAURANT MANAGER - TAKES CUSTOM ORDERS (PROCESS CREATION), DECIDES WHO SERVES WHOM (SCHEDULING), HANDLES WAITING CUSTOMERS (BLOCKED STATE), AND CLEARS TABLES WHEN DONE (TERMINATION).

PCB IS LIKE A FLIGHT BLACK BOX - RECORDS EVERYTHING ABOUT THE PROCESS FLIGHT: CURRENT POSITION (REGISTERS), DESTINATION (PC), PASSENGER INFO (MEMORY), FLIGHT STATUS (STATE). USED TO RESUME OR INVESTIGATE.

analogies.analization: CONTEXT SWITCHING IS LIKE A TEACHER SWAPPING BETWEEN MULTIPLE STUDENTS ANSWERING QUESTIONS: SAVE ONE STUDENT'S ANSWER PROGRESS, CALL NEXT STUDENT, RESTORE THEIR PREVIOUS KNOWLEDGE.

analogies.analogy: PROGRAM IS LIKE A RECIPE (INACTIVE INSTRUCTIONS), PROCESS IS LIKE COOKING THE RECIPE (ACTIVE, CONSUMES TIME/RESOURCES, PRODUCES OUTPUT). SAME RECIPE CAN BE COOKED MULTIPLE TIMES (MULTIPLE PROCESSES).
